hero.title: Florida Medical Facility Cleaning
hero.subtitle: Professional Cleaning and Construction Services for Medical Facilities

facilities.title: What We Clean
facilities.subtitle: From Small hospitals, stand-alone emergency room facilities and outpatient surgery centers to specialized private practices, we ensure the cleanliness and appearance of your facility reflects the quality care you provide your patients.

testimonials.text: FMFC has transformed our facility. Their attention to detail in high-tech environments like our MRI rooms is unmatched. Truly professional and reliable.
testimonials.author: Dr. James Wilson

testimonials.text: We've tried several cleaning companies, but FMFC is the only one that truly understands medical-grade sanitation. Our inspection scores have never been better.
testimonials.author: Sarah Jenkins

testimonials.text: The floors look brand new every single day. They are punctual, thorough, and understand the privacy and care our patients expect.
testimonials.author: Dr. Elena Rodriguez
